about.title: About Daysy
about.description: Daysy is a free, privacy-first event countdown tracker that helps you keep track of important dates and holidays.
about.problemText: Keeping track of upcoming holidays, anniversaries, and important dates across different countries can be challenging. Daysy provides a simple, beautiful countdown view so you never miss what matters.
about.freeText: Daysy is free to use with no ads, no subscriptions, and no hidden costs.
about.privacyText: Your data never leaves your browser. No tracking, no analytics, no cookies, no server. Everything is stored locally on your device.
about.openSourceText: The source code is publicly available on GitHub. You can inspect, modify, and contribute.
about.supportText: If you find Daysy useful, consider supporting its development:
